name: mcp-server-grafana
description: Access and manage Grafana dashboards and datasources.

rating.reason: The toolset demonstrates good documentation overall with clear, descriptive names and comprehensive descriptions for most tools. Complex tools like create_alert_rule and query_prometheus provide detailed explanations of functionality and usage context. Parameter documentation is generally strong with clear purposes and constraints. However, some inconsistencies exist - a few tools have overly brief descriptions (e.g., create_annotation, create_graphite_annotation), and some parameter descriptions could be more detailed. The toolset effectively covers a wide range of Grafana functionality with mostly good clarity, but the mixed quality prevents an A grade.
